zh.lifeSummary: 當Jennet Kincaid於1774年3月26日出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州波藍德時，她的父親Thomas Kincaid23歲，母親Hannah Clingan15歲。她於1792年10月7日與Edward Clingan Sr.在美國田納西州謝佛遜結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她於1850年住在美國阿肯色州克拉克卡多 堂史普。她去世於1855年2月9日在美國阿肯色州克拉克享年80歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州克拉克德 格雷德格雷 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jennet Kincaid于1774年3月26日出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州波藍德时，她的父亲Thomas Kincaid23岁，母亲Hannah Clingan15岁。她于1792年10月7日与Edward Clingan Sr.在美国田纳西州謝佛遜结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她于1850年住在美国阿肯色州克拉克卡多 堂史普。她去世于1855年2月9日在美国阿肯色州克拉克享年80岁，埋葬在美国阿肯色州克拉克德 格雷德格雷 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Kincaid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Kincaid in Campsie (Stirlingshire), recorded in 1238 as Kincaith.

variants.name: Kincaide
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Kincaid  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Kinkaid
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Kincaid  .

nameMeanings.name: Jennet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a simplified spelling of   Jeannette   or a revival of a medieval pet form of the female name   Jean .

variants.name: Jeannette
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.

historicEvents.title: Harrisburg Becomes the State Capital
historicEvents.description: Harrisburg had important parts with migration, the Civil War, and the Industrial Revolution.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History-History of Harrisburg Pennsylvania

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.
Historical Boundaries 1819: Clark, Missouri Territory, United States 1819: Clark, Arkansas Territory, United States 1836: Clark, Arkansas, United States
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

en.lifeSummary: When Jennet Kincaid was born on 26 March 1774, in Cumberland, Pennsylvania, United States, her father, Thomas Kincaid, was 23 and her mother, Hannah Clingan, was 15. She married Edward Clingan Sr. on 7 October 1792, in Jefferson, Tennessee, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She lived in Caddo Township, Clark, Arkansas, United States in 1850. She died on 9 February 1855, in Clark, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 80, and was buried in Degray Cemetery, De Gray, Clark, Arkansas, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jennet Kincaid est née le 26 mars 1774, à Cumberland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, son père, Thomas Kincaid, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Hannah Clingan, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Clingan Sr. le 7 octobre 1792, à Jefferson, Tennessee, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle a vécu à Caddo Township, Clark, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1850. Elle est décédée le 9 février 1855, à Clark, Arkansas, États-Unis, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Degray Cemetery, De Gray, Clark, Arkansas, États-Unis.

Oktober 1792 in Jefferson, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten Edward Clingan Sr. geheiratet. it.lifeSummary: Quando Jennet Kincaid è nata il il 26 marzo 1774 nel Cumberland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Thomas Kincaid, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Hannah Clingan, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Edward Clingan Sr. il 7 ottobre 1792, nel Jefferson, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Caddo Township, Clark, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1850. Morì il 9 febbraio 1855, nel Clark, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Degray Cemetery, De Gray, Clark, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Jennet Kincaidが1774年3月26日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州クウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Thomas Kincaidは23歳，母Hannah Clinganは15歳であった。1792年10月7日にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州ジェフエルソンでEdward Clingan Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州クラークカッドオ トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼女は1855年2月9日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州クラークで80歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州クラークド グレイデグレイ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jennet Kincaid(이)가 1774년 3월 26일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Kincaid(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Clingan(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1792년 10월 7일 미국 테네시 주 제퍼슨에서 Edward Clingan Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 아칸소 주 클라르크 카도 타운시프에서 살았다. 그녀는 1855년 2월 9일 미국 아칸소 주 클라르크에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 클라르크 데 그라이 디그라이 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jennet Kincaid nasceu em 26 de março de 1774, em Cumberland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Thomas Kincaid, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Clingan, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Clingan Sr. em 7 de outubro de 1792, em Jefferson, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela viveu em Caddo Township, Clark, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1850. Ela faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1855, em Clark, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Degray Cemetery, De Gray, Clark, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Degray Cemetery, De Gray, Clark, Arkansa: дегреи кеметири, де греи, кларк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jennet Kincaid родилась 26 марта 1774 г. в местности кумбирланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Thomas Kincaid было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Hannah Clingan, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Clingan Sr. 7 октября 1792 г. в местности джеффирсон, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она жила в местности каддо тоуншип, кларк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году. Она умерла 9 февраля 1855 г. в местности кларк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности дегреи кеметири, де греи, кларк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jennet Kincaid nació el 26 de marzo de 1774, en Cumberland, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, su papá, Thomas Kincaid, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Hannah Clingan, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Edward Clingan Sr. el 7 de octubre de 1792, en Jefferson, Tennessee, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Caddo Township, Clark, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1850. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1855, en Clark, Arkansas, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Degray Cemetery, De Gray, Clark, Arkansas, Estados Unidos.
